name: Double Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, 1 tablespoon milk, and sugar in a large bowl with a wire whisk until smooth.
2. Gently stir in whipped topping. Spread on the bottom of the crust.
3. Pour 1 cup cold milk into a bowl. Add pumpkin, pudding mixes, and spices. Beat with a wire whisk until well mixed (the mixture will be thick).
4. Spread over the cream cheese layer.
5. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until set.
Helpful Hint: Soften cream cheese in the microwave on high for 15 to 20 seconds.
